seo.title: Missouri Dental Assistant License (2026) | Requirements & Fees
seo.description: Complete guide to dental assistant licensing in Missouri — endorsement steps, fees, DANB certification, and radiography permits.
seo.keywords: dental assistant license missouri, dental assistant certification missouri, RDA missouri, DANB CDA missouri, dental assistant radiography missouri

quick_facts.ce_requirement: 2 hours of continuing education per renewal cycle related to infection control or safety.

license_types.title: Expanded Functions Dental Assistant
license_types.description: The primary credential for dental assistants in Missouri.

steps.title: Complete the Application
steps.description: Complete the Dental Assistant Registration Application provided by the Missouri Dental Board.

steps.title: Submit Required Documentation and Fee
steps.description: Submit the completed application and any required documentation along with the $10 fee.

steps.title: Maintain Registration
steps.description: Complete 2 hours of continuing education related to infection control or safety every two years to maintain your registration.

documents.detail: Certificate from CODA-accredited program or documentation of on-the-job training hours.
Official CDA certification from the Dental Assisting National Board, if applicable.
Proof of radiography competency/certification required for taking x-rays.

provisional_text: Some states allow dental assistants to work under direct supervision while obtaining required certifications or completing training.
reciprocity_text: Dental assistants can apply for Expanded Functions Dental Assistant through the Missouri Dental Board by registration.

faqs.question: Does Missouri require a dental assistant license?
faqs.answer: Yes, Missouri requires Expanded Functions Dental Assistant through the state board.

faqs.question: Is DANB certification recognized in Missouri?
faqs.answer: Yes, DANB CDA certification is recognized and often preferred by employers in Missouri.

faqs.question: Can I take dental x-rays in Missouri?
faqs.answer: Yes, but a radiography permit or certification is required.

faqs.question: How much does it cost to become a dental assistant in Missouri?
faqs.answer: State application fees are $10. Additional costs may include DANB CDA exam ($450), radiography certification, and background check fees.

reciprocity.notes: General dental assistants are not licensed. Expanded functions permit is $10.

hero.title: Become a Dental Assistant in Missouri
hero.dek: Missouri Dental Assistant registration requires completing the application, paying the fee, and maintaining continuing education requirements.
